reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar. Cómo socia me gustó el lugar. La atención de la grúa de emergencia, salvo que me cobraron una noche de guardarme el auto, creí que para socios era gratis.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place. As a member, I liked it. The emergency towing service was great, except they charged me for overnight storage; I thought it was free for members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11465332764445308403/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQwblA3TWJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
Sumamente recomendable!!! Exelente atencion! Las personas que trabajan en el ACA Bahia Blanca, son sumamente amables para con los clientes!!! Mi agradecimiento a ellos!!!

(Translated by Google)
Highly recommended!!! Excellent service! The staff at the ACA Bahia Blanca are incredibly friendly to customers!!! My sincere thanks to them!!!

reviews.comment:
Estación de servicios prácticamente nueva. Remodelada hace unos meses. Amplia y completa. A diferencia de muchas estaciones, aquí se permite inflar los neumáticos totalmente Gratis.

(Translated by Google)
A practically brand new service station. Remodeled a few months ago. Spacious and fully equipped. Unlike many stations, here you can inflate your tires completely free of charge.
